title: Getting Started
content: This section covers everything you need to get up and running with this application.

subsections.title: Introduction
subsections.content:
Welcome to My PHP application!

This application demonstrates a modern web interface built with Vue 3 and Bun.

Use the sidebar on the left to navigate between sections, and the search bar at the top to filter content instantly.

subsections.title: Installation
subsections.content:
To get up and running quickly:

  1. Ensure Bun is installed on your system (curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash)
  2. Clone the repository and run bun install to install dependencies
  3. Start the development server with bun run dev
  4. Open your browser at http://localhost:5173

For production, build with bun run build and serve the dist/ folder.

subsections.title: Core Features
subsections.content:
The application includes several powerful features:

  • Real-time Search: Filter content instantly as you type
  • Responsive Design: Works seamlessly on desktop and tablet
  • HTML Support: Display rich formatted content with HTML markup
  • Smooth Navigation: Navigate between sections with smooth scrolling
  • Adjustable Sidebar: Resize the navigation panel to your preference

subsections.title: Search & Navigation
subsections.content:
The search and navigation system is designed for speed and usability:

  • Search filters across all section titles and content, including nested subsections
  • Clicking a sidebar item smoothly scrolls to the relevant content and briefly highlights it
  • Hierarchical sections can be expanded or collapsed in the sidebar using the toggle indicator
  • The sidebar width is draggable — grab the right edge to resize it to your liking

title: Vue 3 Integration
content:
This project leverages the power of Vue 3 with its Composition API.

Vue 3 provides:

  • Better performance and smaller bundle sizes
  • Improved type support for TypeScript
  • More flexible component composition patterns
  • Enhanced reactivity system
Vue 3 makes building interactive user interfaces simpler and more enjoyable.

title: Technical Architecture
content:
The application architecture is built with modern web technologies:

Frontend Stack:
  - Vue 3 (Composition API)
  - Vite (Build tool)
  - CSS3 (Styling)
  - JavaScript ES6+

The sidebar width is adjustable by dragging the resize handle on the right edge.

Search functionality works across both section titles and content, providing instant filtering.

title: Usage Instructions
content:
Here are the key interactions:

  1. Search: Type in the search field at the top to filter content
  2. Navigate: Click on any item in the sidebar to scroll to that section or subsection
  3. Resize: Drag the right edge of the sidebar to adjust its width
  4. Read: Enjoy rich HTML-formatted content in the main panel

The content is loaded from an external JSON file, making it easy to update and maintain.

title: Styling & Customization
content:
The application features a modern design with:

  • Gradient header with purple theme
  • Smooth transitions and hover effects
  • Custom scrollbar styling
  • Responsive typography
  • Accessible color contrast ratios

All styles are scoped to components, preventing CSS conflicts.

You can customize colors, fonts, and spacing by modifying the component styles.
